routeDecision.decision: Keep the existing Feishu benben app/robot as the final production entrance, but replace the backend OpenClaw service behind it from old prod to openclaw-benben.
routeDecision.notChosen: Create a new Feishu app/robot as final production entrance.
routeDecision.interpretation: This is a production cutover, not a shadow Feishu test-surface validation.

opsRepo.headAtPlanStart: 9d3fa7b docs: record benben feishu proof blocker

productRepo.headAtPlanStart: b842f58 docs: document benben feishu test surface proof

cutoverGoal.changeTarget: Move the existing Feishu benben app/robot production ingress from old openclaw-gateway to new openclaw-benben.
desiredEndState: Existing Feishu benben app events reach only openclaw-benben.
openclaw-benben Feishu channel/plugin are enabled only after old prod is no longer receiving the same app.
openclaw-gateway remains available as rollback anchor but must not concurrently consume the same Feishu app.
No Telegram or QQBot scope is included in this cutover.

recommendedExecutionShape.name: single-production-entrance cutover
recommendedExecutionShape.summary: Switch the one existing Feishu app production entrance from old service to new service in a short controlled window. Never operate two active consumers for the same app.

phases.name: fresh_preflight
actions: Record old prod and shadow service health, PIDs, ports, and current channel/plugin state.
Record redacted old/shadow Feishu appId/secret relation without printing raw values.
Confirm proof checker, receive-only CLI, and focused tests still pass in shadow.
Confirm no unexpected watcher targets the shadow workspace or config paths.
stopConditions: Shadow already has Feishu enabled unexpectedly.
Old and shadow state differs from the expected baseline in a way that changes rollback assumptions.

phases.name: prepare_snapshots
actions: Snapshot every file that may be modified under /var/lib/openclaw-benben/.openclaw and /etc/openclaw-benben.
Snapshot old production files that may need rollback evidence, especially old openclaw.json and service/env summaries.
Record Feishu developer-console callback setting redacted fingerprint before external callback change if callback cutover is used.
stopConditions: Any snapshot would expose raw secrets in git or manifests.

phases.name: park_old_feishu_or_switch_callback
phases.preferredAction: Use the Feishu app's single callback/entrance switch so old prod no longer receives events before shadow starts handling them.
phases.alternativeAction: If callback switch is not enough for this OpenClaw deployment model, disable old prod Feishu channel/plugin in old config and reload/restart only as explicitly planned.
phases.hardRequirement: There must be a moment where old prod is confirmed not receiving the existing Feishu app before new shadow is allowed to answer it.
stopConditions: Old prod still receives Feishu events after the planned park/switch.
The callback or park action cannot be verified without sending a production message.
Rollback route to old prod is not clear.

phases.name: enable_new_feishu
actions: Enable only the Feishu channel/plugin on openclaw-benben for the existing app.
Do not enable Telegram or QQBot.
Reload/restart only openclaw-benben if required by the config model.
Confirm openclaw-benben health and PID behavior after the change.
stopConditions: openclaw-benben attempts to enable Telegram or QQBot.
Logs show auth, callback, duplicate delivery, or message-send failures.

phases.name: production_acceptance
actions: Send one owner DM canary to the existing Feishu benben app.
Confirm exactly one response is produced by openclaw-benben.
Run owner identity/persona, status, ordinary answer plan, and memory permission checks.
Run partner permission denial check if partner is available.
Run one safe group canary only if the current production group allowlist is understood.
Confirm no Memory V2/V3/projection/transcript/raw archive is used as answer truth.
Confirm no unsafe tool action executes without explicit ask.
stopConditions: Any send, model, or tool action violates the new runtime gates.

phases.name: stabilize_or_rollback
actions: If acceptance passes, record the final production cutover manifest with hashes, service states, callback state fingerprints, and test matrix.
If acceptance fails, immediately rollback the Feishu app entrance to old prod and disable shadow Feishu again.
stopConditions: Old prod rollback anchor is unhealthy.

primaryRollback: Disable shadow Feishu channel/plugin or restore its pre-cutover config snapshot.
Return the existing Feishu app callback/entrance to old prod, or re-enable old prod Feishu if old config park was used.
Restart/reload only the service whose config rollback requires it.
Confirm old prod openclaw-gateway.service health and exactly one response to a canary.
Keep new shadow artifacts in place for audit unless a separate cleanup approval is given.
rollbackPlan.rollbackAnchor: openclaw-gateway.service remains the rollback anchor until production acceptance passes and a separate decommission decision is made.
rollbackPlan.rollbackWindow: Immediate rollback is required on duplicate responses, no response, auth failure, unsafe memory behavior, or any unplanned service restart.

preCutover: proof checker and receive-only CLI availability
duringCutover: old prod no longer receives current Feishu app events before new replies are accepted
shadow Feishu enabled only once old is parked

hardBlocksBeforeExecution: Do not execute this plan until the user explicitly says '进入修复阶段' again for the cutover execution.
Do not enable old and new services against the same Feishu app at the same time.
Do not leave both old and new in a state where both can send replies to the same Feishu app.
Do not enable Telegram or QQBot as part of this cutover.
Do not use Memory V2/V3/projection/transcript/raw archive as answer truth.
Do not print raw Feishu app ids, secrets, tokens, or callback URLs in manifests or logs.
openQuestionsBeforeExecution: What exact Feishu entrance mechanism is active for the current app: external callback URL, gateway relay, tunnel, or another OpenClaw-specific route?
Is changing the Feishu app callback enough to park old prod, or must old prod Feishu channel/plugin also be disabled?
Which canary messages and groups are acceptable during the short production cutover window?
What is the maximum acceptable rollback window if new benben does not answer correctly?

authorizationStatus.reason: The user confirmed the direct replacement route, but the latest message did not say '进入修复阶段'. This file is plan-only and performs no live changes.
